behavior_summary: U8P_BRIBOOK::func0080 starts a Book::read process to display a long in-game book text (the biography/story of 'Moriens') to the player and then suspends until that reader process completes.
There is no branching, menu, or flag manipulation; the routine simply launches the reader UI with the provided string and waits for the read process to finish.
notable_control_flow: Call Book::read with (pointer to long Moriens text, this) and store returned pid in local 'temp'.
Suspend the current script/process until the Book::read process (pid stored in temp) completes.
open_questions: Exact event that invokes U8P_BRIBOOK::func0080 is not present in the excerpt — inferred to be 'player uses/reads the book' (confidence: medium).
Whether any other scripts check the returned pid or interact with the Book::read process instance is not visible in this excerpt (confidence: low).

main_function.name: U8P_BRIBOOK::func0080
main_function.purpose: Launch the book-reading/display routine to show a long book text (Moriens biography) to the player and wait for it to finish.
entry_conditions: Inferred: invoked when the player uses/opens/reads the book object (object-use/read trigger).
